name: Claw Hook Tool Events
description: Forwards before_tool_call, after_tool_call, and tool_result_persist hook events to a webhook service.

hook_url.label: Webhook Base URL
hook_url.help: Base POST target. Requests are sent to /before_tool_call, /after_tool_call, and /tool_result_persist.

bridge_token.label: Bridge Token
bridge_token.help: Optional bridge_token header sent with each request.
